meaning: n.鍐叉氮娓告垙 缃戠粶鍐叉氮
examples: Hawaii was the birthplace of surfing.
His whole life revolves around surfing.
Surfing the Internet is fun, but it's also a time waster.
Besides sun worshiping, planned local activities include surfing, canoeing, kayaking canopy walks and yoga.
Alaska Airlines flights will offer free connections in August and September for passengers surfing via smartphone.
